config: helix.toml (master defaults: fusion_mode=rrf, blend_mode=legacy, dense on) + --set retrieval.fusion_mode=rrf pin
generator: benchmarks/located_n1000.py --n 500 --seed 42 --axis located (run killed at the 300-row flush; 300 valid rows)
gate_protocol: scripts/calibrate_know_confidence.py 80/20 split seed 42, sklearn logistic, held-out Mann-Whitney AUC, floor 0.70, no --force
verdict: gate pass is a single-split artifact at n=300; features remain ~inseparable under rrf (top_score inverted, coordinate_confidence beta ~0)
